title: The Keys
setting: Spiral Spire — governance hall, deep infrastructure, descent corridors, crystal observatory threshold

system_imports.14_layer_stack_explicit: Each layer named and shown under attack. L1 context stressed, L2 realification flickering, L3-4 Langues Metric contaminated, L5 Poincare reference points shifted (autoimmune analogy), L6 breathing transform disrupted (0.3s pulse stutter), L8+ cascade propagating
system_imports.geoseed_defensive: Icosahedral root grid (642 vertices) as holding points for distributed defense. Nadia holds six critical junctions.
system_imports.hallpassguidance_under_stress: Corridor warrants invalidating, transit paths rerouting through unauthorized channels using Kael's dormant modifications
system_imports.hydra_recon_vs_action: Each Thorne takes a tongue: sensing (Alexander/KO), routing (Nadia/AV), legislation (Eldrin/RU), tuning (Aria/CA), maintenance (Bram/UM), recording (Jorren/DR). Recon vs action distinction embodied in six defenders.

scenes.summary: Spire screams — all six tongue-lights fire simultaneously. Kael's dormant infrastructure activating across the network.
Council chamber as war room. Six walls broadcasting simultaneously. Alexander becomes commander.
Marcus realizes the probes were the trigger signal, not the attack. Kael's planted code is the weapon.

Six defenders take six tongues. Alexander=KO (patience), Nadia=AV (courage), Eldrin=RU (legislation), Aria=CA (tuning), Bram=UM (maintenance), Jorren=DR (record). Each holding their piece of the distributed lock.
Marcus reads the cascade through the 14-layer stack. L5 autoimmune analogy. L6 breathing disrupted. The system attacking itself.
Marcus must go now. Senna commits. Polly leads.
Deep layers — architecture stops pretending, hyperbolic geometry visible. Marcus feels each defender through the crystal.
Crystal observatory. Fourteen facets (seven dark, seven glowing). Izack in his chair. Fizzlecress smoke. 'Polly. You brought company.'

backward.ch01: 0.3-second Protocol pulse stutters during breach — callback to first sensation
backward.ch05: Sera Voss — Jorren vows 'every name, every action, every cost'
backward.ch22: Alexander's training — hyperbolic manifold visible in deep layers
backward.ch23: Icosahedral root grid as defensive holding points
backward.ch24: Dominion probes were the trigger signal, not reconnaissance
backward.ch25: Council seating translates directly to defensive positions

forward.ch27: Observatory arrival — Izack meeting, seventh silence, 'bring him home'
